deterministic.engagement_rationale: 9 signals in the last 14 days from 7 contacts.

llm_produced.narrative: Engagement is high, with nine signals from seven contacts over the past two weeks spanning renewal pricing, billing, webhook configuration, performance-related financials, and product usage. Sentiment is negative: Jordan Jackson (2026-05-01, 'Re: contract renewal') and Quinn Anderson (2026-05-01, 'Re: webhook configuration') both stated Meridian Cloud is evaluating all vendor contracts and requires formal pricing proposals by end of quarter, signaling an active competitive review. Riley Williams (2026-04-30, 'Performance issues') requested a meeting with the commercial team to discuss financial terms tied to performance issues. Alex Davis (2026-05-03, 'Billing questions') acknowledged that pricing concerns went unaddressed too long and wants to reset the conversation, while Quinn Smith (2026-05-03, 'Webhook configuration') cited a procurement process change that delayed a quote. Drew Thomas (2026-05-02, 'Contract renewal') asked whether API call volume is included in the current tier or billed as overage. Product usage remains narrow — only Skylar Williams is active in Lattice Build (member invite, report generation, and search between May 5–8), offering no breadth of adoption to counterbalance the commercial pressure.
